title: gleam_erlang_ffi — process utilities
purpose: gleam_erlang_ffi process utilities are thin wrappers around existing BIFs. Implement as native Rust under gleam_erlang_ffi MFAs.
task: Implement trap_exits, link, demonitor, sleep, flush_messages, register/unregister_process, process_named, pid_from_dynamic.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement OS environment functions

requirements.title: Process flag and link wrappers
requirements.spec: trap_exits/1, link/1, demonitor/1 delegate to existing facilities.

requirements.title: Sleep, flush, and registry wrappers
requirements.spec: sleep/1, sleep_forever/0, flush_messages/0, register_process/2, unregister_process/1, process_named/1.

requirements.title: pid_from_dynamic/1 and registration
requirements.spec: pid_from_dynamic checks term type. All functions registered under gleam_erlang_ffi.
